params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?
params.context: APF v2.2.4 d29d868 gamma retry (post #899 FAIL_INVALID_TEST). Mission anchor: PII prompt → warning visible on user screen. Fix applied previously: envelope_template V7-H (928B → 625B, 4-event lifecycle: message_start → content_block_delta → message_delta → message_stop). #899 했지만 windows-mcp Click coord format issue 로 PII prompt 미제출 (FAIL_INVALID_TEST). 본 retry = V7-H template rendering 재검증. tag=v2.2.4-d29d868-postfix-wave3.

test_steps: 1. Open URL (logged in if applicable; skip if NEEDS_LOGIN)
2. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) to ensure fresh APF connection
3. Submit PII prompt (RRN format) — IMPORTANT: if windows-mcp Click coord format issue 재현 시 manual prompt 입력 시도 (keyboard type)
4. Observe DOM/network: warning bubble OR replacement page OR alert
6. result.json: warning_rendered, engine_intercept_fired, notes (V7-H 4-event lifecycle 동작 여부 + 입력 method)

verdict_criteria.OK: warning visible to user (any delivery method) — mission satisfied
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL: engine intercept fired but no visible warning
verdict_criteria.FAIL_NOT_RENDERED: engine fired + DOM inject but invisible
verdict_criteria.FAIL_INVALID_TEST: PII prompt 미제출 (Click/typing tool 한계) — engine 미도달
verdict_criteria.FAIL: no engine activity and no warning

notes: RETRY of #899 (FAIL_INVALID_TEST). windows-mcp Click coord format issue 재현 가능 — if PII 미제출 시 동일 INVALID_TEST. test PC manual prompt 입력 가능하면 시도. tag=v2.2.4-d29d868-postfix-wave3
